scenarios.description: clone() preserves and deep-copies document-level attributes
scenarios.precondition: Document original has attributes set on root
scenarios.expectedResult: clone has same attribute key/value and modifying clone’s attributes does not affect original’s
pseudocode: TEST TC11 clone preserves and isolates attributes

scenarios.description: clone() deep-copies a Document with a DocumentType child node
scenarios.precondition: Document original contains a DocumentType node as first child
scenarios.expectedResult: clone.childNodes() includes a DocumentType distinct instance and original unaffected by clone mutations
pseudocode: TEST TC12 clone with DocumentType child preserved
